metadata.description: Document lifecycle management, GitHub operations, and AI-searchable document indexing

plugins.name: forge
plugins.description: AI-powered document lifecycle tool. Create, review, and auto-fix requirements/design/plan docs and code.

plugins.name: anvil
plugins.description: GitHub operations toolkit. Create PRs, manage issues, and automate GitHub workflows.

plugins.name: doc-advisor
plugins.description: AI-searchable document index (ToC) generator for Claude Code

plugins.name: doc-db
plugins.description: Heading-chunk hybrid search index plugin (Embedding + Lexical + LLM Rerank)
